steps.t: The unruly horse is waiting at the Elthengels stable in the Norcrofts. The stable-hand, Adnoth, has asked you to take the unruly horse for a ride, in …
Elthengels' stable-hand, Adnoth, is awaiting your return at the stables near the south-west entrance to Elthengels. The unruly steed led you to discov…
